# SlopGuard text fixture (.txt) — materialized to .rs (Rust plugin TBD)
lang: rust
file: sample.rs
---
// Placeholder for future Rust detectors.
fn bad(rows: &[&str]) -> Vec<&str> {
    let mut out = Vec::new();
    for r in rows {
        let re = regex::Regex::new(r"^\d+").unwrap();
        if re.is_match(r) {
            out.push(r);
        }
    }
    out
}
